race.description: Wingham Beef Week 12-15 May Class 1 Hcp
race.comment: ON MY COMMAND (5) well in the market at debut when taken to the front and never headed with a slick 2.25 len win over 1100m at Grafton on April 19. Should handle the conditions and prove hard to run down from the sticky gate. Can justify the favouritism today. MOSGIEL CRYSTAL (6) back for her second prep and jumped in trip with a soft Maiden win after leading throughout over 1312m here. Shapes as the main danger with the upside to go on with it this time in. DEEBEE'S GIRL (8) had genuine excuses last time out when she got her tongue over the bit to finish a fading last over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Tongue-tie goes on and is set to bounce back. EDDIE'S CHARM (9) third-up today after she knocked up late with a respectable fifth over 1262m at this track. Genuine each way contender.
